history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a smartphone screen displaying a video player interface with a centered pop-up message in Indonesian.

A large dark-gray pop-up dialog is centered over the video, featuring a yellow circular icon at the top with a black crown symbol, and white text reading “Premium bertambah” and “Mari nikmati semua fitur premium >.<”. Below the text is a large rounded gray button with the word “Oke” in white centered within it. Behind the pop-up, the video player controls are visible at the top and mid-screen, including a left arrow, “Episode 1” text, a pause symbol in the center, “Episode 3” text with a right-side arrow, and “Autonext” and “1080p” labels near the center-right. At the top left, there is a time display “13.45” and a row of small icons. In the lower portion behind the pop-up, there are comment-related elements and user entries with profile circles and small badges, including a visible label “Rare” on the right side of one comment area, and multiple lines of Indonesian text such as “ayo berteman” and “1 Replies”.

The setting is an on-screen mobile video viewing page with overlay controls and a modal pop-up, with no clear outdoor or indoor scene visible since the background is a video interface.

The screen uses dark backgrounds for the player and dialog, with prominent contrast from the yellow crown icon and white text. The pop-up is rectangular with rounded corners and sits centered, partially covering the video and comment list. The camera angle is a direct view of the phone display.

Visible Text:
13.45
Episode 1
Episode 3
Autonext
1080p
Premium bertambah
Mari nikmati semua fitur premium >.<
Oke
ayo berteman
1 Replies
Rare

Practical Summary:
A mobile video player screen shows episode controls and video quality settings behind a centered subscription-related pop-up. The pop-up invites viewing “Premium bertambah” features and includes an “Oke” button to dismiss it.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
